original: A military-grade squad automatic weapon, the Aegis is a high-tech solution to front line offense and defense. Equipped with a huge box of ammunition, the user can send a withering hail of bullets down range and generate a hardlight shield around the weapon’s muzzle, creating a moving point of cover in whatever direction he or she is firing.
